title: Policy: Policies Applied - Restart the app
scenario: Verify that policies applied to a device persist and update correctly after app restarts
steps: Start the app, log in, and create a policy for the device.
Re-launch the app and check that settings affected by the policy are still locked.
Turn off the app, make changes to the policy, then start the app again and verify the changes are properly applied.
expected: Policies applied to a device persist after restarting the app. Settings affected by the policy remain locked after re-launch, and any changes made to the policy are properly applied upon restart.
